question: Is the NBA team located in the same city as the headquarters of the company currently offering the highest price for Janus Henderson the one that drafted Victor Wembanyama first overall?

chain.fact: Victory Capital is the company currently offering the highest price ($57.04 per share) for Janus Henderson and is based in San Antonio.

Victor Wembanyama was drafted first overall by the San Antonio Spurs.
